\caption{Complete detector-mismatch variant table: every (variant, arm, $\bar\rho$) group at the $M/n=0.5$, $\nu=500$ anchor, including the severity sweeps (dead-time error to $\pm20\%$, dark rate $5$--$50\%$, afterpulsing to $10\%$) and the start-mode, guard-time and dead-time-jitter axes. $n$ = rows in group; $n_{\mathrm{pair}}$ = per-(image,seed) pairs used for the paired dPSNR; $\Delta\mathrm{flux}$ is the difference of median radiometric flux deviations (variant $-$ baseline). \textsc{missing} marks $\bar\rho=0.3$ interaction cells with no matched baseline. The dark50\%-known PRECORRECT safe row is the un-flooring anomaly: the normally floored PRECORRECT safe reconstruction ($\mathrm{flux\_dev}=-1.0$) un-floors to $\mathrm{flux\_dev}\approx0$ under a known $50\%$ dark rate, giving a $-2.60$~dB paired shift. All values verbatim from the frozen artifact; non-numeric PSNR dropped from medians, never imputed.}
\label{tab:s3_full}\\
